sentence: 台下的听众不停地鼓掌喝彩。
pinyin: Táixià de tīngzhòng bù tíng de gǔzhǎng hècǎi.
english: The audience below the stage kept applauding and cheering.

meaning: 1. the emperor; 2. Your majesty the emperor; 3. His imperial majesty
sentence: 剧里的皇上每天要处理很多奏折。
pinyin: Jù lǐ de huángshàng měitiān yào chǔlǐ hěn duō zòuzhé.
english: The emperor in the drama has to deal with many official memorials every day.

sentence: 一辆货车停在路边卸货。
pinyin: Yī liàng huò chē tíng zài lùbiān xiè huò.
english: A truck was parked on the side of the road unloading goods.

meaning: 1. to fund; 2. to put money into sth; 3. to invest
sentence: 他出资为社区修建了一条新路。
pinyin: Tā chūzī wèi shèqū xiūjiàn le yī tiáo xīn lù.
english: He funded the construction of a new road for the community.

meaning: to hinge on; to be decided by; to depend on
sentence: 结果取决于你的努力程度。
pinyin: Jié guǒ qǔ jué yú nǐ de nǔ lì chéng dù.
english: The outcome depends on how hard you work.
